violations.text: The walk-in freezer was observed with an accumulation of ice build-up. Establishment is to run a defrost on unit. New Violation. Correct By: 06/11/2025
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025

The storage room floors throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/09/2025
